description.en: Review probability theory, random variables, distributions, and core statistical methods.
description.zh: 复习概率论基础、随机变量、常见分布以及统计推断的核心方法。

description.en: Focus on feedback systems, transfer functions, stability analysis, and root locus for final review.
description.zh: 围绕反馈系统、传递函数、稳定性分析和根轨迹法做期末复习。

description.en: Refresh Boolean algebra, logic gates, combinational circuits, and sequential circuits.
description.zh: 系统梳理布尔代数、逻辑门、组合逻辑与时序逻辑电路。

description.en: Cover continuous and discrete signals, transforms, and standard system analysis methods.
description.zh: 复习连续与离散信号、常见变换，以及系统分析的标准方法。
